name: Greater Centennial
description_short: Greater Centennial AME Zion Church is a religious congregation offering spiritual guidance, community support, and pastoral counseling services to members and visitors.
description_long: Greater Centennial AME Zion Church is an African Methodist Episcopal Zion Church located in the Greater Centennial area, serving its congregation under the leadership of Senior Pastor Rev. Dr. Stephen W. Pogue, who has served the ministry faithfully for more than 10 years. The church is organized around spiritual growth, community engagement, and member support services rooted in Christian faith and discipleship. The church offers membership services including baptism, communion, counseling sessions, and right hand of fellowship programs for new members. Additionally, Greater Centennial provides community support through various ministries including adult and family life programs, youth and young adult services, women's and men's ministries, and specialized support groups. The church distinguishes itself through its multi-generational approach to faith development, offering services for children, youth, adults, and families, along with dedicated missionary and outreach work. A significant caveat is that Greater Centennial is fundamentally a religious organization, not a consumer finance company. While it does offer counseling services and community support, it does not provide financial products, loans, credit repair, or debt relief services. The listing of this church under a payday-alternatives or consumer finance category is a categorical misclassification.
services: Pastoral and faith-based counseling via Zoom or in-person
Right hand of fellowship and new member classes
Bible study and Christian education programs
pros: Free or low-cost counseling services available to members via Zoom or in-person at (914) 664-1838 x107
Multiple weekly worship options including 7:00 AM and 9:30 AM Sunday services plus livestream access
Community support programs including youth, women's, men's, and family ministries
Membership services including baptism, communion, wedding, and funeral support
Accessible leadership with named pastoral staff and clear contact information for various services
Bible study, discipleship, and Christian education programs for all age groups
Emergency support and prayer request services available to congregation members
cons: Not a financial services provider—offers no loans, credit products, or debt relief despite current categorization
Counseling services are primarily faith-based pastoral counseling, not secular financial counseling
Services are primarily available to active church members, not the general public
Website does not provide specific information about financial assistance programs or emergency funds
No online application, account management, or digital financial services platform
best_for: Active members of Greater Centennial AME Zion Church seeking spiritual counseling and support
Individuals looking for faith-based community support and pastoral guidance
Families interested in multi-generational church engagement and Christian education
diagnosis: Greater Centennial AME Zion Church is a religious congregation best suited for individuals seeking faith-based spiritual counseling, community support, and church membership services. The critical caveat is that this is not a consumer finance company and should not be categorized as a payday alternative, emergency cash lender, or any financial services provider—it offers no loans, credit products, or debt relief services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
